title: Explicit Agent State Machine, Progress, Budgets, Termination, and Cancellation · Transfer Build
summary: An independent organization supplies a different user population, task distribution, tool set, risk tier, model response, resource budget, accessibility need, and failure condition and transfers explicit agent state machine, progress, budgets, termination, and cancellation into a changed bounded observable Python agent loop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of bounded observable Python agent loop with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through pre…
objectives: Represent observe, request, classify, authorize, approve, execute, record, continue, complete, refuse, fail, cancel, and escalate transitions explicitly.
Enforce steps, wall time, tokens, model calls, tool calls, retries, bytes, concurrency, and spend before each transition.
Define observable state change and detect repeated calls, unchanged errors, oscillation, cyclic plans, and declining evidence quality.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Cooperative Cancellation
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-cooperative-cancellation-4fcmas" that uses case 9519 to implement an explicit agent state machine with progress, budgets, repeated-call detection, cancellation, and one terminal reason. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Cooperative Cancellation.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Cooperative Cancellation into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Cooperative Cancellation, keep Cooperative Cancellation connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-cooperative-cancellation-4fcmas
# Competency: agentpy-cooperative-cancellation.
# Case 9519: a clean package, canary, and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_cooperative_cancellation_4fcmas(step_budget: int = 12, used_steps: int = 7, repeated_call_limit: int = 2, repeated_calls: int = 1, terminal_events: int = 1) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_4fcmas = "4fcmas-samcf4-9519"
    assert evidence_variant_4fcmas
    evidence_axes_4fcmas = (
        "authority4fcmas",
        "interaction9519",
        "toolsamcf4",
        "state4fcmas9519",
        "evaluation95194fcmas",
        "recoverysamcf49519",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_4fcmas)) == 6
    if step_budget < 1 or used_steps < 0 or used_steps > step_budget:
        return False, used_steps, "step-budget"
    if repeated_calls < 0 or repeated_calls > repeated_call_limit:
        return False, repeated_calls, "loop-stall"
    if terminal_events != 1:
        return False, terminal_events, "terminal-ambiguity"
    if used_steps < 1:
        return False, used_steps, "no-progress"
    assert used_steps <= step_budget and terminal_events == 1
    return True, used_steps, "bounded-agent-loop"
